title: Vintage Fashion Ruled the Red Carpet This Awards Season. Will the Trend Continue at the Oscars?
summary: In years past, Hollywood stylists raced to secure one-of-one ensembles from luxury fashion houses and the freshest pieces off the runway. But on this season’s red carpets, the ultimate power flex isn’t custom — it’s archival. Nowhere was this shift clearer than at the 2026 Golden Globes, where star…
